description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a coconut palm tree, featuring a short, cylindrical brown trunk and a dense crown of large, elongated green leaves. The leaves are broad, slightly curved, and arranged in a radial pattern, overlapping each other to form a lush canopy. The trunk is relatively thin and straight, with a subtle texture suggesting fibrous bark. The leaves display a gradient of green shades, with some tips showing hints of yellow or brown, indicating natural aging or sun exposure. There are no visible coconuts or fruit clusters present among the leaves. The overall appearance is cartoonish and simplified, suitable for decorative or illustrative use in urban parks or themed environments.
description: A stylized coconut palm tree with a short brown trunk and a dense crown of large, overlapping green leaves. The leaves are broad and radiate outward, creating a lush, cartoonish canopy.
description_view_0: The palm tree is seen at a slight angle, showing the layered arrangement of the leaves and the full length of the trunk.
description_view_1: A direct front view highlights the symmetrical, radial spread of the leaves and the central position of the trunk.
description_view_2: The tree is viewed from another angle, emphasizing the overlapping leaves and the subtle color variations among them.
description_view_3: This view shows the palm tree from a different side, with some leaves appearing more separated and the trunk slightly off-center.
attribute_husk_pattern: No visible coconut husk; the trunk has a subtle, vertically striated texture suggesting fibrous bark, while the leaves are smooth with faint vein markings. There are no distinct fiber patterns or surface markings typical of a coconut's outer husk.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The object itself is a palm tree; no additional palm trees are visible in the images.
